# Auto-generated formulas focused on low-coverage modules
# One formula per line. Lines starting with # are skipped by diff_harness / katex-rs-cli.

# ---- Macro definitions / internal parser commands (def.rs) ----
\def\foo#1{#1^2}\foo{x}
\gdef\bar#1#2{#1+#2}\bar{a}{b}
\edef\baz{abc123}\baz
\xdef\qux{xyz789}\qux
\let\oldalpha=\alpha \oldalpha + \beta
\global\def\gfoo#1{#1!}\gfoo{n}
\long\def\twice#1{#1#1}\twice{z}
\futurelet\nexttoken x\nexttoken + 1
\romannumeral123

# ---- Internal char command (char.rs) ----
\@char{65}
\@char{945}
\@char{9731}

# ---- Color paths (color.rs) ----
\textcolor{ff0000}{x+y}
\textcolor{00aa00}{\frac{a+b}{c+d}}
\textcolor{0000ff}{x + y + z}
\textcolor{800080}{\left( \frac{1}{1-x} \right)}
\textcolor{ff8800}{a+b}+\textcolor{008080}{c+d}

# ---- Delimiter sizing + left/right/middle (delimsizing.rs) ----
\bigl( x \bigr)
\Bigl[ x \Bigr]
\biggl\{ x \biggr\}
\Biggl\langle x \Biggr\rangle
\big|x\big|
\Big\|x\Big\|
\left( a \bigm| b \right)
\left\langle a \Bigm\| b \right\rangle
\left\{ a \middle| b \right\}
\left. \frac{d}{dx}f(x) \right|_{x=0}
\left\langle x \middle/ y \right\rangle
\left( \frac{a}{b} \middle\vert \frac{c}{d} \right)

# ---- Under-accents (accentunder.rs) ----
\underleftarrow{AB}
\underrightarrow{AB}
\underleftrightarrow{AB}
\undergroup{a+b+c}
\underlinesegment{mn}
\utilde{xyz}

# ---- xArrow family (arrow.rs) ----
\xleftarrow{n}
\xleftarrow[k\to\infty]{f_k}
\xrightarrow{f}
\xrightarrow[i\to\infty]{a_i}
\xLeftarrow{A}
\xRightarrow{B}
\xleftrightarrow{C}
\xLeftrightarrow{D}
\xhookleftarrow{h}
\xhookrightarrow{h}
\xmapsto{m}
\xrightharpoondown{r}
\xrightharpoonup{r}
\xleftharpoondown{l}
\xleftharpoonup{l}
\xrightleftharpoons{eq}
\xleftrightharpoons{eq}
\xlongequal{def}
\xtwoheadrightarrow{surj}
\xtwoheadleftarrow{inj}
\xtofrom{swap}
\xrightleftarrows{mix}
\xrightequilibrium{chem}
\xleftequilibrium{chem}

# ---- Enclose family (enclose.rs, dom_tree/line_node.rs, dom_tree/svg_node.rs) ----
\cancel{x}
\cancel{a+b}
\bcancel{x}
\bcancel{a+b+c}
\xcancel{x}
\xcancel{a+b+c+d}
\sout{abc}
\fbox{x+y}
\angl{Z}
\phase{V}
\colorbox{ffff00}{x+y}
\fcolorbox{000000}{ffff00}{x+y}

# ---- Links / HTML extension / images (href.rs, html.rs, includegraphics.rs, dom_tree/anchor.rs, dom_tree/img.rs) ----
\href{https://example.com}{x+1}
\href{https://example.com/docs?k=1#top}{\frac{a}{b}}
\url{https://example.com/a~b}
\url{https://example.org/path/to/resource}
\htmlClass{cls-a cls-b}{x+y}
\htmlId{eq-42}{x^2+y^2}
\htmlStyle{color: blue; border: 1px solid red;}{x+y}
\htmlData{key=value,answer=42}{x+y}
\includegraphics{https://example.com/logo.png}
\includegraphics[width=1.5em,height=1.2em]{https://example.com/icon.svg}
\includegraphics[height=1.5em,totalheight=2em,alt=sample-image]{https://example.com/img/test-image.jpg}
\includegraphics[width=10bp,height=12bp]{https://example.com/file.eps}

# ---- Math class + pmb + style switches (mclass.rs, pmb.rs, styling.rs) ----
\mathord{+}\mathbin{*}\mathrel{=}
\mathopen{(}x\mathclose{)}
\mathpunct{,}\mathinner{x+y}
\pmb{A+B}
\displaystyle \sum_{i=1}^{n} i^2
\textstyle \frac{1}{1+x}
\scriptstyle \frac{a}{b}
\scriptscriptstyle x^y

# ---- Array/environments (array.rs) ----
\begin{array}{cc}a&b\\c&d\end{array}
\begin{array}{|c|c|}\hline a&b\\\hline c&d\\\hline\end{array}
\begin{array}{c}a\\[0.5em]b\end{array}
\begin{array}{c}a\cr b\end{array}
\begin{darray}{rl}x&=1\\y&=2\end{darray}
\begin{matrix}a&b\\c&d\end{matrix}
\begin{pmatrix}a&b\\c&d\end{pmatrix}
\begin{bmatrix}1&0\\0&1\end{bmatrix}
\begin{Bmatrix}a&b\\c&d\end{Bmatrix}
\begin{vmatrix}a&b\\c&d\end{vmatrix}
\begin{Vmatrix}a&b\\c&d\end{Vmatrix}
\begin{cases}x^2,&x\ge0\\-x,&x<0\end{cases}
\begin{dcases}x^2,&x\ge0\\-x,&x<0\end{dcases}
\begin{rcases}x^2,&x\ge0\\-x,&x<0\end{rcases}
\begin{drcases}x^2,&x\ge0\\-x,&x<0\end{drcases}
\begin{aligned}a&=b+c\\d&=e+f\end{aligned}
\begin{align*}a&=b\\c&=d\end{align*}
\begin{align}a&=b+c\\d&=e+f\end{align}
\begin{split}a&=b+c\\&=d+e\end{split}

# ---- Symbol families / spacing / delimiter atoms (symbols_op.rs, symbols_ord.rs, symbols_spacing.rs) ----
x\prime
x^{\prime\prime\prime}
1,2,3
(a,b]
\lgroup x \rgroup
\lmoustache x \rmoustache
\lvert x \rvert + \lVert y \rVert
\uparrow A \downarrow + \Updownarrow B
\forall x\in\mathbb{R},\exists y\in\mathbb{Q}
\operatorname{Var}(X)=\mathbb{E}[X^2]-\mathbb{E}[X]^2

# ---- Unicode symbol normalization / accent decomposition paths ----
é + è + ã
x́ + ŷ + z̃
汉字 + テスト

# ---- Extra mixed formulas for Parser/build/common hot paths ----
\sqrt[3]{\frac{1+x}{1-x}}
\frac{\partial^2 u}{\partial x^2}+\frac{\partial^2 u}{\partial y^2}=0
\sum_{k=0}^{\infty}\frac{x^k}{k!}
\prod_{i=1}^{n}(1+x_i)
\int_{-\infty}^{\infty} e^{-x^2}\,dx
\left(\sum_{i=1}^{n} i\right)^2
\left\langle \vec{u},\vec{v}\right\rangle
\verb|a_b^c|
\verb*| spaced text |
